ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the company in million dollars */,
  "num_employees" INTEGER /* Total number of employees in the company */,
  "employee_growth" REAL /* Percentage growth in number of employees */,
  "total_funding" REAL /* Total funding received by the company in million dollars */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the company is headquartered */,
  "last_funding_round" TEXT /* Type of the last funding round */,
  "last_funding_date" TEXT /* Date of the last funding round */,
  "valuation" REAL /* Current valuation of the company in million dollars */,
  "growth_stage" TEXT /* Growth stage of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investors" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor */,
  "investor_name" TEXT /* Name of the investor or investment firm */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the investor */,
  "investment_strategy" TEXT /* Description of the investor's strategy (e.g., growth, value) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the investor is based */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the investor is based */,
  "total_investments" INTEGER /* Total number of investments made by the investor */,
  "total_investment_amount" REAL /* Total amount of investments made by the investor in million dollars */,
  "average_return" REAL /* Average return on investment (ROI) for the investor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment transaction */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor making the investment */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company receiving the investment */,
  "investment_amount" REAL /* Amount of investment in million dollars */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date of the investment */,
  "funding_round" TEXT /* Type of funding round */,
  "valuation_at_investment" REAL /* Valuation of the company at the time of investment in million dollars */,
  "equity_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of equity acquired in the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance metric */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company associated with the metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., revenue growth, profit margin) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., Financial, Operational) */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., Internal, Third-Party) */,
  "metric_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the metric (e.g., Monthly, Quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Description of the market condition (e.g., recession, growth) */,
  "impact_level" TEXT /* Level of impact on companies (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the condition was recorded */,
  "condition_source" TEXT /* Source of the market condition (e.g., Government Report, News Article) */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the market condition */,
  "impact_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the impact (e.g., Short, Medium, Long) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor associated with the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Performance, Funding) */,
  "report_source" TEXT /* Source of the report (e.g., Internal, Third-Party) */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions associated with the role */,
  "default_dashboard" TEXT /* Default dashboard assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role assigned to the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor providing feedback */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the feedback is related to */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the investor */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the investor (1-5) */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., Positive, Negative) */,
  "follow_up_action" TEXT /* Follow-up action required based on the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message content */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Report, Funding) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the notification (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the alert is related to */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., revenue drop, funding issue) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value that triggers the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., Active, Resolved) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the resolution of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
